title: Compact Golems
description: Adds a craftable compact iron and snow golems.
body:
### What's this mod?

This mod adds a compact golems that acts like a spawn egg, this allows you to skip building golems and take a ready-made item instead

### Crafts

![Compact Iron Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2b3c355c43b9e877b43266f0882c03488c12893.png)

![Compact Snow Golem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/399fea7108f40d5331bc676894b7e69039afeccb.png)
